caption: A man wearing a large, grey, pointed wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a small brown bow tie and brown suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone, and to his left is a logo featuring a microphone and the text "THE STALLIO PODCAST". To his right, red text reads "GOSS TALK JOY" along with smaller text underneath. The background consists of a wall covered in framed photographs and clothing items on hangers, including a shirt labeled "LEE". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his facial expression and head angle while looking downward and to the side. The camera remains static, capturing the man from the chest up as he maintains a contemplative or listening posture.
